notes: Reduced Google Sheets read requests by caching Pathmark Online records and reading tables with a batch request.
Added a loading spinner while the online workspace is prepared from the user-owned Google Sheet.
Moved Pathmark Online closer to the desktop mechanics by adding action blocks under goals and routine activities under routines.
Tasklists, Google Calendar ICS exports, and Google Tasks CSV exports are now derived from action blocks and routine activities rather than only from separate ad hoc rows.
Expanded the Pathmark Sync sheet schema while preserving existing beta rows by appending missing columns instead of replacing headers.
